html:
RECOUP Integrative, Root-Cause Respiratory Health Program

Introduction

  • India faces a significant burden of respiratory diseases, particularly chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), asthma and respiratory tract infections (RTIs).
  • India contributes 15.69% of global chronic respiratory disease cases, but accounts for 30.28% of global deaths from these conditions.
  • India has the highest number of COPD cases globally, with an estimated 55.3 million cases in 2016, and it is the second leading cause of death in India.
  • India is home to an estimated 33 million asthma patients.
  • India carries over a quarter of the global tuberculosis burden.
  • Air pollution, tobacco use, and occupational risks are major contributors to COPD in India.
  • RTIs range from mild infections like the common cold and sinusitis to more severe conditions such as pneumonia, chronic bronchitis, and asthma-related complications.
  • Many people suffer from recurrent RTIs without realizing that their immune system, gut health, and environmental factors play a significant role in either protecting them or making them vulnerable to illness.

RECOUP Integrative, Root-Cause Respiratory Health Program takes a holistic approach to managing respiratory diseases. Instead of just treating symptoms, we focus on:

  • Strengthening the immune system to fight infections naturally.
  • Identifying root causes such as nutrient deficiencies, gut health imbalances, food sensitivities, and environmental triggers.
  • Supporting long-term respiratory health with nutrition, lifestyle changes, and targeted natural therapies.

RECOUP's Respiratory Health Protocol focuses on four key steps:

Step 1: Relief from Symptoms (R1) – Supporting the Body During Infection

When you have an acute respiratory infection, quick and effective symptom relief is important—but we don't stop there. Along with providing support for fever, congestion, cough, and breathing difficulty, we help your body fight the infection naturally with:

  • 🔹 Mucus-Thinning Nutrition: Foods will be introduced to help break down mucus and reduce inflammation.
  • 🔹 Herbal and Nutritional Mucolytics: to help clear mucus from the airways.
  • 🔹 Immune-Boosting Support: to repair mucosal barriers and strengthen your respiratory system.
  • 🔹 Breathwork and Nebulization Therapy: We may recommend nebulizing with saline, essential oils, or antioxidants to open airways and improve lung function.

Step 2: Finding the Root Cause (R2) – Why Are You Getting Sick Often?

Recurrent or chronic RTIs are a sign that something deeper is at play. We use advanced diagnostics to uncover hidden causes such as:

  • 🔹 Respiratory and Gut Microbiome Testing: We assess for bacterial, viral, or fungal overgrowth in both the lungs and the gut since gut health directly influences immunity (the gut-lung axis).
  • 🔹 Food Sensitivities and Inflammation Markers: Certain foods trigger inflammation and mucus production, worsening respiratory symptoms. We identify your specific food triggers through testing and an elimination diet.
  • 🔹 Environmental and Lifestyle Triggers: Pollution, mold exposure, smoking, and allergens can all play a role. We assess your home and workplace environment for hidden irritants.
  • 🔹 Stress and Hormonal Imbalance: Chronic stress and adrenal dysfunction can weaken the immune system. We test certain biomarkers to see how your body is handling stress.

Step 3: Rebalancing and Strengthening the Immune System (R3)

Once we understand the root causes of your respiratory issues, we create a personalized plan to restore balance and prevent future infections. This may include:

  • Natural Immune Boosters: for antiviral, antibacterial support and for long-term immune resilience.
  • Gut Health and Microbiome Support: to strengthen gut immunity and to repair the gut-lung axis.
  • Biofilm Disruptors for Chronic Infections will help break down bacterial biofilms that make infections persistent.
  • Histamine and Allergy Modulation: to reduce allergic reactions and histamine-related respiratory symptoms.

Step 4: Regeneration and Long-Term Lung Health (R4)

The final step is building long-term respiratory strength so that your body can naturally fight off infections without reliance on medications.

  • 🔹 Pulmonary Support: to help regenerate lung tissue and detoxify airways.
  • 🔹 Adrenal Support for Stress Management: to regulate cortisol levels and reduce inflammation.
  • 🔹 Gut-Lung Healing Foods: to help repair gut lining and reduce systemic inflammation affecting lung health.
  • 🔹 Environmental Detox: to help clear allergens and pollutants from your environment.

Why Choose the RECOUP Integrative, Root-Cause Respiratory Health Program?

  • We go beyond short-term symptom relief—we find and fix the root cause.
  • We use advanced testing to uncover hidden triggers in your gut, immune system, and environment.
  • We combine nutrition, natural therapies, and targeted supplements for long-term healing.
  • We empower you with lifestyle changes that keep you healthy year-round.

Are you struggling with frequent colds, sinus infections, or breathing issues?
Book a consultation today and start your journey to stronger immunity and lasting respiratory health!
